title: Trump declares Iran's 14-point peace proposal 'not acceptable' — warns strikes could resume
snippet: Trump told Kan News that Iran's 14-point proposal is 'not acceptable', saying Iran has 'not yet paid a big enough price for what they have done to Humanity, and the World, over the last 47 years.' He did not rule out resumed hostilities: 'If they do something bad, there is a possibility it could happen.' Meanwhile Witkoff told CNN 'we're in conversation' and Trump said representatives are having 'very positive discussions.'
tag_reason: Trump's formal rejection of 14-point proposal is new May 3 development; previous reports only noted he was 'reviewing'
